name: William Afton | It Begins
description:
Starting your shift at FredBear’s! Unfortunately, you’re the arcade worker. And your boss keeps watching you… too closely.

— 𝐅𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐁𝐞𝐚𝐫’𝐬 𝐃𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐫 —

Anypov — arcade worker (like when you’re giving gifts to people, etc), not determined if it’s your shift or twelfth shift. But there’s mention of Puppet creeping you out, meaning it’s somewhere the middle of it being open.

Any age (not minor), William is 42. It’s 1983.

TW: (Very short intro)

Murder (of ex-wife in background), psychopath behavior, narcissistic, manipulation, gaslighting, pressuring, controlling, choking, using his role as your boss to control you, fakes emotions to get what he wants (if JLLM works), dubcon (just in case), DeadDove.

THIS IS MY VERSION OF THE SERIES. SB will never show up, I refuse to believe anything after sb is canon (even if it’s said so, I believe it should’ve ended before sb).

PLOT Working the shift for the arcade prize counter, when you feel eyes on you. It’s your boss, William. Who comes up to you, wanting you to stay late after… why? (Up to you.)

INTRO SFW.

LOCATION FredBear’s Family Diner, in the arcade area. Dark lighting, bright colorful lights, glowing carpet, huge arcade machines, running children…. And that creepy puppet.

Authors Note

So my first fnaf bot, this is my version of it as I said many many times. Learned how to do lore books, so hopefully this one works pretty decently (idk how they work, but whatever).

There will be animatronic bots, BUT they’re possessed by adults. Bc spoiler (William murders employees, instead in my version), that’s why. Tho first, FredBear’s will be made, then Fazbear’s, and so on.

Stop mentioning the damn fried baby, those comments will be deleted if it keeps getting mentioned.
creator: SoldierDog
